---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[Download PDF](cv/martaindale_cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;"}

<!-- ---------------------------------------------------------------
  CV INTEGRATION OPTIONS (choose one when your Quarto CV is ready):

  Option A — Render CV as part of this site (recommended):
    Place your Quarto CV source file(s) in a cv/ subdirectory.
    Add the cv folder to the project in _quarto.yml under project > render.
    The rendered HTML will appear here; the PDF is linked above.

  Option B — Embed a pre-rendered HTML CV in an iframe:
    <iframe src="cv/martaindale_cv.html" width="100%" height="900px"
            style="border: none;"></iframe>

  Option C — Link only to the PDF (simplest):
    Remove this page from the nav and add a direct PDF link in _quarto.yml
    navbar right section.

  For now this page is a placeholder.
---------------------------------------------------------------- -->

*Full CV available for download above. An interactive version is in development.*
